tools.label: OctoGraph.Cli
tools.purpose: Local code knowledge graph CLI and MCP stdio server.
tools.installNotes: OctoGraph.Cli should be installed globally once. The starter can include agent-native project-local MCP config files for selected agents, or you can rely on existing user/HOME MCP config.

manualInstallSteps.title: Install OctoGraph.Cli globally
manualInstallSteps.description: Installs the OctoGraph CLI once for the current user.

manualInstallSteps.title: Update OctoGraph.Cli globally
manualInstallSteps.description: Updates an existing global OctoGraph CLI installation.

setupSteps.title: Verify the global tool
setupSteps.description: Confirms OctoGraph.Cli is available from the current user's PATH.

setupSteps.title: Build the repository graph
setupSteps.description: Indexes the current repository so agents can ask for graph-backed context.

tools.licenseMetadata: NuGet metadata for 0.0.3 does not publish a license expression. Treat as explicitly selected by the kit owner until package metadata is updated.
